panels.title: Session Quality
panels.description: Composite score (0-100) across smoothness, content delivery, and reliability. Excludes TTFT (provider-bound). Based on sessions with 3+ turns.

targets.rawQueryText:
WITH session_stats AS (
  SELECT
    session_id,
    MIN(ts_ms) as first_ts,
    AVG(CASE WHEN metric='chat.jank_pct' THEN value END) as jank,
    AVG(CASE WHEN metric='chat.fresh_content_lag_ms' THEN value END) as lag,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN metric='chat.message_queue_stale_drop' THEN 1 END) as drops,
    AVG(CASE WHEN metric='chat.subscribe_ack_ms' THEN value END) as sub_ack,
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN metric='chat.timeline_apply_ms' AND value > 50 THEN 1 END) AS REAL) /
      MAX(1, COUNT(CASE WHEN metric='chat.timeline_apply_ms' THEN 1 END)) * 100 as hitch_pct,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN metric='chat.catchup_ring_miss' AND value > 0 THEN 1 END) as ring_misses,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN metric='chat.ttft_ms' THEN 1 END) as turns
  FROM chat_metric_samples
  WHERE session_id IS NOT NULL AND session_id != ''
    AND ts_ms BETWEEN $__from AND $__to
  GROUP BY session_id
  HAVING turns >= 3
)
SELECT ROUND(AVG(100.0
  - MIN(25, MAX(0, (COALESCE(jank, 0) - 5) * 25.0 / 25))
  - MIN(15, MAX(0, (hitch_pct - 2) * 15.0 / 13))
  - MIN(20, MAX(0, (COALESCE(lag, 1000) - 300) * 20.0 / 2700))
  - MIN(10, MAX(0, (COALESCE(sub_ack, 500) - 200) * 10.0 / 1800))
  - MIN(25, drops * 5.0)
  - MIN(5, ring_misses * 5.0)), 0) AS value
FROM session_stats

SELECT ROUND(AVG(value), 1) as value
FROM chat_metric_samples
WHERE metric = 'chat.session_load_ms'
  AND build_number = (SELECT MAX(build_number) FROM chat_metric_samples)
  AND ts_ms BETWEEN $__from AND $__to

SELECT CAST((ts_ms / 1000 / 3600) * 3600 AS INTEGER) AS time, SUM(value) AS value
FROM chat_metric_samples
WHERE metric = 'chat.catchup_ring_miss'

GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Catch-up ring miss per hour (should trend to zero)

targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT CAST(ts_ms / 1000 AS INTEGER) AS time, value
FROM chat_metric_samples
WHERE metric = 'chat.timeline_apply_ms'
  AND build_number >= '21'
  AND ts_ms BETWEEN $__from AND $__to
ORDER BY ts_ms

targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT
  COALESCE(json_extract(tags_json, '$.result'), 'unknown') AS result,
  COUNT(*) AS samples,
  ROUND(AVG(value), 1) AS avg_ms,
  ROUND(MIN(value), 1) AS min_ms,
  ROUND(MAX(value), 1) AS max_ms,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN value > 500 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) AS over_500ms_pct
FROM chat_metric_samples
WHERE metric = 'chat.catchup_ms'
  AND ts_ms BETWEEN $__from AND $__to
GROUP BY result
ORDER BY samples DESC

targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT
  COALESCE(json_extract(tags_json, '$.phase'), 'unknown') AS phase,
  COUNT(*) AS samples,
  ROUND(AVG(value), 1) AS avg_pct,
  ROUND(MIN(value), 1) AS min_pct,
  ROUND(MAX(value), 1) AS max_pct,
  CAST(ROUND(AVG(CAST(json_extract(tags_json, '$.cycles') AS INTEGER))) AS INTEGER) AS avg_cycles,
  CAST(ROUND(AVG(CAST(json_extract(tags_json, '$.hitches') AS INTEGER))) AS INTEGER) AS avg_hitches
FROM chat_metric_samples
WHERE metric = 'chat.jank_pct'
  AND ts_ms BETWEEN $__from AND $__to
GROUP BY phase
ORDER BY avg_pct DESC
targets.queryText:
SELECT
  COALESCE(json_extract(tags_json, '$.phase'), 'unknown') AS phase,

  ROUND(MIN(value), 1) AS min_pct,
  ROUND(MAX(value), 1) AS max_pct,
  CAST(ROUND(AVG(CAST(json_extract(tags_json, '$.cycles') AS INTEGER))) AS INTEGER) AS avg_cycles,
  CAST(ROUND(AVG(CAST(json_extract(tags_json, '$.hitches') AS INTEGER))) AS INTEGER) AS avg_hitches
FROM chat_metric_samples
WHERE metric = 'chat.jank_pct'
  AND ts_ms BETWEEN $__from AND $__to
GROUP BY phase
ORDER BY avg_pct DESC

SELECT
  COALESCE(json_extract(tags_json, '$.phase'), '<none>') AS phase,
  COALESCE(json_extract(tags_json, '$.status'), '<none>') AS status,
  COUNT(*) AS samples,
  ROUND(AVG(value), 2) AS avg_ms,
  ROUND(MIN(value), 2) AS min_ms,
  ROUND(MAX(value), 2) AS max_ms
FROM chat_metric_samples
WHERE metric = 'chat.voice_setup_ms'
  AND ts_ms BETWEEN $__from AND $__to
GROUP BY phase, status
ORDER BY phase, status

targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT
  COALESCE(json_extract(tags_json, '$.stt_backend'), '<none>') AS stt_backend,
  COALESCE(json_extract(tags_json, '$.model'), '<none>') AS model,
  COUNT(*) AS sessions,
  ROUND(AVG(value), 0) AS avg_ms,
  ROUND(MIN(value), 0) AS min_ms,
  ROUND(MAX(value), 0) AS max_ms
FROM chat_metric_samples
WHERE metric = 'chat.dictation_session_ms'
  AND ts_ms BETWEEN $__from AND $__to
GROUP BY stt_backend, model
ORDER BY sessions DESC
targets.queryText:
SELECT
  COALESCE(json_extract(tags_json, '$.stt_backend'), '<none>') AS stt_backend,
  COALESCE(json_extract(tags_json, '$.model'), '<none>') AS model,
  COUNT(*) AS sessions,
  ROUND(AVG(value), 0) AS avg_ms,
  ROUND(MIN(value), 0) AS min_ms,
  ROUND(MAX(value), 0) AS max_ms
FROM chat_metric_samples
WHERE metric = 'chat.dictation_session_ms'
  AND ts_ms BETWEEN $__from AND $__to
GROUP BY stt_backend, model
ORDER BY sessions DESC

targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT
  COALESCE(json_extract(tags_json, '$.provider'), 'unknown') AS provider,
  COALESCE(json_extract(tags_json, '$.model'), 'unknown') AS model,
  COUNT(*) AS samples,
  ROUND(AVG(value), 2) AS avg_ms,
  ROUND(MIN(value), 2) AS min_ms,
  ROUND(MAX(value), 2) AS max_ms,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN value > 1200 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) AS over_1200ms_pct
FROM chat_metric_samples
WHERE metric = 'chat.ttft_ms'
  AND ts_ms BETWEEN $__from AND $__to
GROUP BY provider, model
ORDER BY samples DESC, avg_ms DESC
targets.queryText:
SELECT
  COALESCE(json_extract(tags_json, '$.provider'), 'unknown') AS provider,
  COALESCE(json_extract(tags_json, '$.model'), 'unknown') AS model,
  COUNT(*) AS samples,
  ROUND(AVG(value), 2) AS avg_ms,
  ROUND(MIN(value), 2) AS min_ms,
  ROUND(MAX(value), 2) AS max_ms,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN value > 1200 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) AS over_1200ms_pct
FROM chat_metric_samples
WHERE metric = 'chat.ttft_ms'
  AND ts_ms BETWEEN $__from AND $__to
GROUP BY provider, model
ORDER BY samples DESC, avg_ms DESC

targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT
  session_id,
  COALESCE(json_extract(tags_json, '$.provider'), 'unknown') AS provider,
  COALESCE(json_extract(tags_json, '$.model'), 'unknown') AS model,
  CAST(MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'chat.session_message_count' THEN value END) AS INTEGER) AS message_count,
  CAST(MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'chat.session_input_tokens' THEN value END) AS INTEGER) AS input_tokens,
  CAST(MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'chat.session_output_tokens' THEN value END) AS INTEGER) AS output_tokens,
  CAST(MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'chat.session_mutating_tool_calls' THEN value END) AS INTEGER) AS mutating_tool_calls,
  CAST(MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'chat.session_files_changed' THEN value END) AS INTEGER) AS files_changed,
  CAST(MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'chat.session_added_lines' THEN value END) AS INTEGER) AS added_lines,
  CAST(MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'chat.session_removed_lines' THEN value END) AS INTEGER) AS removed_lines,
  CAST(MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'chat.session_context_tokens' THEN value END) AS INTEGER) AS context_tokens,
  CAST(MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'chat.session_context_window' THEN value END) AS INTEGER) AS context_window,
  MAX(build_number) AS latest_build,
  datetime(MAX(ts_ms) / 1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime') AS last_seen
FROM chat_metric_samples
WHERE metric IN (
  'chat.session_message_count',
  'chat.session_input_tokens',
  'chat.session_output_tokens',
  'chat.session_mutating_tool_calls',
  'chat.session_files_changed',
  'chat.session_added_lines',
  'chat.session_removed_lines',
  'chat.session_context_tokens',
  'chat.session_context_window'
)
  AND ts_ms BETWEEN $__from AND $__to
GROUP BY session_id, provider, model
ORDER BY MAX(ts_ms) DESC
targets.queryText:
SELECT
  session_id,
  COALESCE(json_extract(tags_json, '$.provider'), 'unknown') AS provider,
  COALESCE(json_extract(tags_json, '$.model'), 'unknown') AS model,
  CAST(MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'chat.session_message_count' THEN value END) AS INTEGER) AS message_count,
  CAST(MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'chat.session_input_tokens' THEN value END) AS INTEGER) AS input_tokens,
  CAST(MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'chat.session_output_tokens' THEN value END) AS INTEGER) AS output_tokens,
  CAST(MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'chat.session_mutating_tool_calls' THEN value END) AS INTEGER) AS mutating_tool_calls,
  CAST(MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'chat.session_files_changed' THEN value END) AS INTEGER) AS files_changed,
  CAST(MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'chat.session_added_lines' THEN value END) AS INTEGER) AS added_lines,
  CAST(MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'chat.session_removed_lines' THEN value END) AS INTEGER) AS removed_lines,
  CAST(MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'chat.session_context_tokens' THEN value END) AS INTEGER) AS context_tokens,
  CAST(MAX(CASE WHEN metric = 'chat.session_context_window' THEN value END) AS INTEGER) AS context_window,
  MAX(build_number) AS latest_build,
  datetime(MAX(ts_ms) / 1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime') AS last_seen
FROM chat_metric_samples
WHERE metric IN (
  'chat.session_message_count',
  'chat.session_input_tokens',
  'chat.session_output_tokens',
  'chat.session_mutating_tool_calls',
  'chat.session_files_changed',
  'chat.session_added_lines',
  'chat.session_removed_lines',
  'chat.session_context_tokens',
  'chat.session_context_window'
)
  AND ts_ms BETWEEN $__from AND $__to
GROUP BY session_id, provider, model
ORDER BY MAX(ts_ms) DESC

targets.rawQueryText:

FROM chat_metric_samples
WHERE metric = 'chat.cell_configure_ms'
  AND COALESCE(json_extract(tags_json, '$.expanded'), '0') = '1'
  AND ts_ms BETWEEN $__from AND $__to
ORDER BY ts_ms
targets.queryText:
SELECT CAST(ts_ms / 1000 AS INTEGER) AS time, value
FROM chat_metric_samples
WHERE metric = 'chat.cell_configure_ms'

targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT
  COALESCE(json_extract(tags_json, '$.content_type'), 'collapsed') AS content_type,
  COALESCE(json_extract(tags_json, '$.tool'), 'unknown') AS tool,
  COALESCE(json_extract(tags_json, '$.output_bytes'), '?') AS output_bytes,
  COALESCE(json_extract(tags_json, '$.expanded'), '0') AS expanded,
  COUNT(*) AS samples,
  ROUND(AVG(value), 2) AS avg_ms,
  ROUND(MIN(value), 2) AS min_ms,
  ROUND(MAX(value), 2) AS max_ms,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN value > 16 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 1) AS over_16ms_pct
FROM chat_metric_samples
WHERE metric = 'chat.cell_configure_ms'
  AND ts_ms BETWEEN $__from AND $__to
GROUP BY content_type, tool, output_bytes, expanded
ORDER BY max_ms DESC

panels.title: Coalescer Load + Queue High-Water
panels.description: Coalescer metrics are emitted as ~1s windows (`tags.flushes` is usually about 30), so this panel normalizes them back to per-flush averages. `queue_high_water` is not a live queue gauge; it only records when a session reaches a new max.

panels.title: Session Quality Trend
panels.description: Daily average session quality score with session count.

targets.rawQueryText:
WITH session_stats AS (
  SELECT
    session_id,
    MIN(ts_ms) as first_ts,
    AVG(CASE WHEN metric='chat.jank_pct' THEN value END) as jank,
    AVG(CASE WHEN metric='chat.fresh_content_lag_ms' THEN value END) as lag,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN metric='chat.message_queue_stale_drop' THEN 1 END) as drops,
    AVG(CASE WHEN metric='chat.subscribe_ack_ms' THEN value END) as sub_ack,
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN metric='chat.timeline_apply_ms' AND value > 50 THEN 1 END) AS REAL) /
      MAX(1, COUNT(CASE WHEN metric='chat.timeline_apply_ms' THEN 1 END)) * 100 as hitch_pct,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN metric='chat.catchup_ring_miss' AND value > 0 THEN 1 END) as ring_misses,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN metric='chat.ttft_ms' THEN 1 END) as turns
  FROM chat_metric_samples
  WHERE session_id IS NOT NULL AND session_id != ''
    AND ts_ms BETWEEN $__from AND $__to
  GROUP BY session_id
  HAVING turns >= 3
),
scored AS (
  SELECT
    first_ts / 1000 as ts,
    100.0
  - MIN(25, MAX(0, (COALESCE(jank, 0) - 5) * 25.0 / 25))
  - MIN(15, MAX(0, (hitch_pct - 2) * 15.0 / 13))
  - MIN(20, MAX(0, (COALESCE(lag, 1000) - 300) * 20.0 / 2700))
  - MIN(10, MAX(0, (COALESCE(sub_ack, 500) - 200) * 10.0 / 1800))
  - MIN(25, drops * 5.0)
  - MIN(5, ring_misses * 5.0) as score
  FROM session_stats
)
SELECT ts as time, ROUND(score, 0) as quality_score
FROM scored
ORDER BY ts

panels.title: Session Quality Breakdown
panels.description: Per-session quality breakdown. Worst sessions first. Shows which dimension dragged the score down.

targets.rawQueryText:
WITH session_stats AS (
  SELECT
    session_id,
    MIN(ts_ms) as first_ts,
    AVG(CASE WHEN metric='chat.jank_pct' THEN value END) as jank,
    AVG(CASE WHEN metric='chat.fresh_content_lag_ms' THEN value END) as lag,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN metric='chat.message_queue_stale_drop' THEN 1 END) as drops,
    AVG(CASE WHEN metric='chat.subscribe_ack_ms' THEN value END) as sub_ack,
    CAST(COUNT(CASE WHEN metric='chat.timeline_apply_ms' AND value > 50 THEN 1 END) AS REAL) /
      MAX(1, COUNT(CASE WHEN metric='chat.timeline_apply_ms' THEN 1 END)) * 100 as hitch_pct,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN metric='chat.catchup_ring_miss' AND value > 0 THEN 1 END) as ring_misses,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN metric='chat.ttft_ms' THEN 1 END) as turns
  FROM chat_metric_samples
  WHERE session_id IS NOT NULL AND session_id != ''
    AND ts_ms BETWEEN $__from AND $__to
  GROUP BY session_id
  HAVING turns >= 3
)
SELECT
  session_id,
  turns,
  ROUND(COALESCE(jank, 0), 1) as jank_pct,
  ROUND(hitch_pct, 1) as hitch_pct,
  ROUND(COALESCE(lag, 1000)) as lag_ms,
  ROUND(COALESCE(sub_ack, 500)) as sub_ack_ms,
  drops as stale_drops,
  ROUND(100.0
  - MIN(25, MAX(0, (COALESCE(jank, 0) - 5) * 25.0 / 25))
  - MIN(15, MAX(0, (hitch_pct - 2) * 15.0 / 13))
  - MIN(20, MAX(0, (COALESCE(lag, 1000) - 300) * 20.0 / 2700))
  - MIN(10, MAX(0, (COALESCE(sub_ack, 500) - 200) * 10.0 / 1800))
  - MIN(25, drops * 5.0)
  - MIN(5, ring_misses * 5.0), 0) as score
FROM session_stats
ORDER BY score ASC
LIMIT 20

panels.title: Crashes and Hangs (MetricKit diagnostics)
panels.description: Daily count of crash and hang diagnostic payloads reported by MetricKit.

targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT
  date(window_start_ms/1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime') as day,
  SUM(CASE WHEN summary_json LIKE '%crashDiag%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as crashes,
  SUM(CASE WHEN summary_json LIKE '%hangDiag%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as hangs,
  SUM(CASE WHEN summary_json LIKE '%cpuException%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as cpu_exceptions
FROM metrickit_payloads
WHERE kind = 'diagnostic'
  AND window_start_ms BETWEEN $__from AND $__to
GROUP BY day
ORDER BY day

panels.title: App Responsiveness (MetricKit hang histogram buckets)
panels.description: Number of hang diagnostic events per day from MetricKit. Includes crash, hang, and CPU exception categories.

targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT
  CAST(window_end_ms / 1000 AS INTEGER) AS time,
  COUNT(*) as value
FROM metrickit_payloads
WHERE kind = 'diagnostic'
  AND window_start_ms BETWEEN $__from AND $__to
GROUP BY date(window_start_ms/1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime')
ORDER BY time

panels.title: CPU and GPU Time (MetricKit daily)
panels.description: Cumulative CPU and GPU time per 24-hour MetricKit reporting window.

targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT
  CAST(window_end_ms / 1000 AS INTEGER) AS time,
  CAST(REPLACE(json_extract(json_extract(summary_json, '$.cpuMetrics'), '$.cumulativeCPUTime'), ' sec', '') AS REAL) as value
FROM metrickit_payloads
WHERE kind = 'metric'
  AND summary_json LIKE '%cpuMetrics%'
  AND window_start_ms BETWEEN $__from AND $__to
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  CAST(window_end_ms / 1000 AS INTEGER) AS time,
  CAST(REPLACE(json_extract(json_extract(summary_json, '$.gpuMetrics'), '$.cumulativeGPUTime'), ' sec', '') AS REAL) as value
FROM metrickit_payloads
WHERE kind = 'metric'
  AND summary_json LIKE '%gpuMetrics%'
  AND window_start_ms BETWEEN $__from AND $__to
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Peak Memory Usage (MetricKit daily)
panels.description: Peak memory usage reported by MetricKit per 24-hour window. Extracted from raw payload to avoid summary truncation.

targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT
  CAST(window_end_ms / 1000 AS INTEGER) AS time,
  CAST(REPLACE(json_extract(json_extract(raw_json, '$.payload'), '$.memoryMetrics.peakMemoryUsage'), ' kB', '') AS REAL) / 1024.0 as value
FROM metrickit_payloads
WHERE kind = 'metric'
  AND raw_json != '{}'
  AND json_extract(json_extract(raw_json, '$.payload'), '$.memoryMetrics.peakMemoryUsage') IS NOT NULL
  AND window_start_ms BETWEEN $__from AND $__to
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Network Transfer (MetricKit daily)
panels.description: Cumulative WiFi and cellular download/upload per 24-hour MetricKit window.

targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT
  CAST(window_end_ms / 1000 AS INTEGER) AS time,
  CAST(REPLACE(json_extract(json_extract(raw_json, '$.payload'), '$.networkTransferMetrics.cumulativeWifiDownload'), ' kB', '') AS REAL) / 1024.0 as value
FROM metrickit_payloads
WHERE kind = 'metric' AND raw_json != '{}'
  AND json_extract(json_extract(raw_json, '$.payload'), '$.networkTransferMetrics.cumulativeWifiDownload') IS NOT NULL
  AND window_start_ms BETWEEN $__from AND $__to
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  CAST(window_end_ms / 1000 AS INTEGER) AS time,
  CAST(REPLACE(json_extract(json_extract(raw_json, '$.payload'), '$.networkTransferMetrics.cumulativeWifiUpload'), ' kB', '') AS REAL) / 1024.0 as value
FROM metrickit_payloads
WHERE kind = 'metric' AND raw_json != '{}'
  AND json_extract(json_extract(raw_json, '$.payload'), '$.networkTransferMetrics.cumulativeWifiUpload') IS NOT NULL
  AND window_start_ms BETWEEN $__from AND $__to
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  CAST(window_end_ms / 1000 AS INTEGER) AS time,
  CAST(REPLACE(json_extract(json_extract(raw_json, '$.payload'), '$.networkTransferMetrics.cumulativeCellularDownload'), ' kB', '') AS REAL) / 1024.0 as value
FROM metrickit_payloads
WHERE kind = 'metric' AND raw_json != '{}'
  AND json_extract(json_extract(raw_json, '$.payload'), '$.networkTransferMetrics.cumulativeCellularDownload') IS NOT NULL
  AND window_start_ms BETWEEN $__from AND $__to
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  CAST(window_end_ms / 1000 AS INTEGER) AS time,
  CAST(REPLACE(json_extract(json_extract(raw_json, '$.payload'), '$.networkTransferMetrics.cumulativeCellularUpload'), ' kB', '') AS REAL) / 1024.0 as value
FROM metrickit_payloads
WHERE kind = 'metric' AND raw_json != '{}'
  AND json_extract(json_extract(raw_json, '$.payload'), '$.networkTransferMetrics.cumulativeCellularUpload') IS NOT NULL
  AND window_start_ms BETWEEN $__from AND $__to
ORDER BY time

panels.title: Disk I/O and Storage (MetricKit daily)
panels.description: Cumulative logical writes and total disk space used per 24-hour MetricKit window.

targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT
  CAST(window_end_ms / 1000 AS INTEGER) AS time,
  CAST(REPLACE(json_extract(json_extract(raw_json, '$.payload'), '$.diskIOMetrics.cumulativeLogicalWrites'), ' kB', '') AS REAL) / 1024.0 as value
FROM metrickit_payloads
WHERE kind = 'metric' AND raw_json != '{}'
  AND json_extract(json_extract(raw_json, '$.payload'), '$.diskIOMetrics.cumulativeLogicalWrites') IS NOT NULL
  AND window_start_ms BETWEEN $__from AND $__to
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  CAST(window_end_ms / 1000 AS INTEGER) AS time,
  CAST(REPLACE(json_extract(json_extract(raw_json, '$.payload'), '$.diskSpaceUsageMetrics.totalDataFileSize'), ' kB', '') AS REAL) / 1024.0 as value
FROM metrickit_payloads
WHERE kind = 'metric' AND raw_json != '{}'
  AND json_extract(json_extract(raw_json, '$.payload'), '$.diskSpaceUsageMetrics.totalDataFileSize') IS NOT NULL
  AND window_start_ms BETWEEN $__from AND $__to
ORDER BY time

panels.title: App Launch Time (MetricKit daily)
panels.description: Cumulative foreground and background time per 24-hour MetricKit window.

targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT
  CAST(window_end_ms / 1000 AS INTEGER) AS time,
  CAST(REPLACE(json_extract(json_extract(raw_json, '$.payload'), '$.applicationTimeMetrics.cumulativeForegroundTime'), ' sec', '') AS REAL) as value
FROM metrickit_payloads
WHERE kind = 'metric' AND raw_json != '{}'
  AND json_extract(json_extract(raw_json, '$.payload'), '$.applicationTimeMetrics.cumulativeForegroundTime') IS NOT NULL
  AND window_start_ms BETWEEN $__from AND $__to
ORDER BY time

SELECT
  CAST(window_end_ms / 1000 AS INTEGER) AS time,
  CAST(REPLACE(json_extract(json_extract(raw_json, '$.payload'), '$.applicationTimeMetrics.cumulativeBackgroundTime'), ' sec', '') AS REAL) as value
FROM metrickit_payloads
WHERE kind = 'metric' AND raw_json != '{}'
  AND json_extract(json_extract(raw_json, '$.payload'), '$.applicationTimeMetrics.cumulativeBackgroundTime') IS NOT NULL
  AND window_start_ms BETWEEN $__from AND $__to
ORDER BY time

panels.title: MetricKit Payload Log
panels.description: Raw log of all MetricKit payloads received. Shows payload type, build, window range, and key summary fields.

targets.rawQueryText:
SELECT
  datetime(received_at_ms/1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime') as received,
  kind,
  build_number as build,
  app_version as version,
  datetime(window_start_ms/1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime') as window_start,
  datetime(window_end_ms/1000, 'unixepoch', 'localtime') as window_end,
  CASE
    WHEN kind = 'diagnostic' AND summary_json LIKE '%crashDiag%' THEN 'crash'
    WHEN kind = 'diagnostic' AND summary_json LIKE '%hangDiag%' THEN 'hang'
    WHEN kind = 'diagnostic' AND summary_json LIKE '%cpuException%' THEN 'cpu_exception'
    WHEN kind = 'metric' AND summary_json LIKE '%cpuMetrics%' THEN 'full_daily'
    WHEN kind = 'metric' THEN 'disk_snapshot'
    ELSE kind
  END as payload_type
FROM metrickit_payloads
WHERE window_start_ms BETWEEN $__from AND $__to
   OR received_at_ms BETWEEN $__from AND $__to
ORDER BY received_at_ms DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT CAST(ts_ms / 1000 AS INTEGER) AS time, value
FROM chat_metric_samples
WHERE metric = 'device.cpu_pct'
  AND ts_ms BETWEEN $__from AND $__to
ORDER BY ts_ms

SELECT CAST(ts_ms / 1000 AS INTEGER) AS time, value
FROM chat_metric_samples
WHERE metric = 'device.memory_mb'
  AND ts_ms BETWEEN $__from AND $__to
ORDER BY ts_ms

SELECT CAST(ts_ms / 1000 AS INTEGER) AS time, value
FROM chat_metric_samples
WHERE metric = 'device.memory_available_mb'
  AND ts_ms BETWEEN $__from AND $__to
ORDER BY ts_ms

SELECT CAST(ts_ms / 1000 AS INTEGER) AS time, value
FROM chat_metric_samples
WHERE metric = 'device.thermal_state'
  AND ts_ms BETWEEN $__from AND $__to
ORDER BY ts_ms
